overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene set in a medieval tavern called 'The Thirsty Broomstick'. The player character stands in the main hall observing the warm, candlelit interior with wooden architecture, an upper balcony, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern hall with upper balcony and stone fireplace

events.description: an NPC walks from left to right in the background, passing behind the player character

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern main hall, facing the fireplace and upper balcony area

notable_agents.action: walking from left to right across the background, passing behind the player character
standing on the upper balcony overlooking the tavern floor

entered.detail: wooden railing on the upper level overlooking the main hall
wooden sign with gold lettering mounted on the upper balcony
large stone archway with glowing fire inside, located beneath the balcony
rustic wooden dining tables scattered throughout the tavern floor
wall-mounted torch providing warm orange lighting
several framed artworks hanging on the wooden wall
circular iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candles
thick wooden structural beams supporting the upper level

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in a dimly lit medieval tavern with warm candlelight illuminating wooden beams and furniture. The 'Thirsty Broomstick' sign hangs above a stone fireplace on the upper balcony level, while an NPC stands on the balcony and another walks past in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across the warm, candlelit interior of a medieval tavern. It begins with a view of the dimly lit main hall, where soft light illuminates heavy wooden beams and rustic furniture. As the camera lingers, the perspective shifts upward toward a stone fireplace on the upper balcony level, revealing the Thirsty Broomstick sign hanging above. The scene then expands to include the movement of the tavern's inhabitants, focusing on an NPC standing on the balcony while another figure drifts past in the background.
